children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses the neighborhood she grew up in and her childhood friends.

citation: "Childhood Neighborhood and Childhood Memories," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4210/childhood-neighborhood-and-childhood-memories, accessed May 06, 2026
label: 2. Childhood Neighborhood and Childhood Memories
